title: INFINITY Project Researchers Recognised with Best Paper Awards at ESWC / SemDH 2026
content: We are pleased to share that researchers from the INFINITY Project have been recognised with two Best Paper Awards at ESWC / SemDH 2026, highlighting outstanding contributions to semantic technologies and their application in the cultural heritage domain. The awarded papers showcase innovative approaches that support the development of more structured, interoperable, and intelligent solutions […]
snippet: We are pleased to share that researchers from the INFINITY Project have been recognised with two Best Paper Awards at ESWC / SemDH 2026, highlighting outstanding contributions to semantic technologies
creator: Antonia Bobik
sourceDescription: Join us on a journey through time

title: Contribute to “Robotics and Physical Artificial Intelligence for Cultural Heritage”
content: The journal npj Heritage Science has launched a dedicated collection entitled “Robotics and Physical Artificial Intelligence for Cultural Heritage”, inviting submissions of original research articles that advance both cultural heritage and robotics-related fields.
snippet: The journal npj Heritage Science has launched a dedicated collection entitled “Robotics and Physical Artificial Intelligence for Cultural Heritage”, inviting submissions of original research articles

title: New Self-Assessment Tool Helps Archives Improve Sustainability and Reduce Costs
content: A new online self-assessment tool developed through the EU Sustainable Archives and Greener Approaches (SAGA) project offers archival institutions a practical way to evaluate their environmental performance and identify opportunities for improvement.

title: Open Maps Explores New Research Directions for Digitised Historical Cartographic Material
content: A new working paper from the Open Maps initiative explores these questions and presents emerging research directions and methodological approaches for working with digitised historical cartographic material.

title: How Cultural Heritage Can Lead the Way
content: A new publication from the common European data space of cultural heritage explores how Public AI can be developed and strengthened through the rich, diverse, and trusted resources of cultural heritage institutions across Europe.

title: Call for Papers Now Open: DTI Conference Prague 2026
content: Taking place from 18–20 November 2026 at the historic Břevnov Monastery in Prague, the conference will bring together archivists, researchers, cultural heritage professionals, and technology experts from across Europe and beyond to explore the future of digital archives and historical knowledge infrastructures.
snippet: Taking place from 18–20 November 2026 at the historic Břevnov Monastery in Prague, the conference will bring together archivists, researchers, cultural heritage professionals, and technology experts

title: New European Heritage Masterclass Explores the Role of Cultural Heritage in Shaping Europe’s Future
content: European Heritage Masterclass with Prof. Dr. Hermann Parzinger, a new 12-part video series developed by Europa Nostra was recently launched as part of the Europa Nostra Heritage Agora project, co-funded by the European Union's Creative Europe Programme.

title: Working Across Disciplines for Memory Preservation
content: The upcoming ECHOES Online Synergy Workshop, which will bring together projects and organisations working at the intersection of remembrance, digital memory, cultural heritage, education, community engagement, and technology.

title: Showcase Your Innovation at the MetaHeritage Pitching Showcase
content: MetaHeritage is inviting innovators from across Europe and beyond to apply  for its Pitching Showcase: Call for Investment Ideas in Digital Heritage, Immersive Technologies and Cultural Tourism.

title: EIT Culture & Creativity launches €6 million in funding for fashion and the lived environment through the NEB Academy
content: The way we inhabit spaces and manufacture clothes in Europe are two of the defining questions of our time. EIT Culture & Creativity has launched two open calls worth a combined €6 million through the NEB Academy for teams working at the frontier of circular fashion and the transformation of Europe’s lived environments.  The calls […]

title: European Heritage Awards / Europa Nostra Awards 2027
content: The Call for Entries for the European Heritage Awards / Europa Nostra Awards 2027 is now officially open, inviting outstanding heritage initiatives from across Europe to apply.

title: Human Frontier Science Program Frontier Workshop 2026
content: The workshop welcomes participants from a wide range of disciplines, including paleogenomics, paleo-phenomes, evolutionary biology, paleontology, natural history collections, artificial intelligence, digital heritage, imaging technologies and computational sciences.
